name: heartline
description: Heartline — installs client + server deps, builds the client, and runs the single deployable server. Used by hosting platforms (Render/Railway/etc.) that expect one root-level build+start pair; local development still uses the two-terminal workflow in README.md.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.build: npm run install:all && npm run build --prefix client
